title: manilkara calcicola
intro: Manilkara calcicola, also known as the Yellow Bilva or Yellow Lead Tree, is a tropical plant species native to the Indo-Pacific region. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its traditional use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Manilkara calcicola include its potential to alleviate fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and therapeutic benefits.
